steps.title: Read the graphed line
steps.content: The line shown is $y=f(x)+11$. Reading two points from the grid gives a negative slope and the equation $y=-x+6$.

steps.title: Match to the form with positive $c,d$
steps.content: Rewrite as $f(x)=-5-1\cdot x=-d-cx$ with $d=5,\ c=1$ (both positive). That matches choice A — A is correct.
